test case id: tc-addtocart-001 title: user adds a product to the cart module: addtocart source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - product name: trekking shoes - product description: lightweight hiking shoes test steps: 1. user clicks on the "trekking shoes" link. 2. server receives the request to add the product to the cart. 3. server adds the product to the user's cart. 4. server sends a confirmation message to the user. expected result: product is added to the user's cart.

test case id: tc-login-001 title: user successfully logs in module: login source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword test steps: 1. user enters "testuser" into the username field. 2. user enters "testpassword" into the password field. 3. user clicks the login button. 4. server receives the login request. 5. server verifies the credentials. 6. server sends a success message to the user. expected result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

test case id: tc-serverhandleaddproduct-001 title: server adds a product to the cart module: serverhandleaddproduct source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user sends a request to add a product to the cart. test data: - product name: trekking shoes - product description: lightweight hiking shoes test steps: 1. user sends a request to add the product to the cart. 2. server adds the product to the user's cart. 3. server sends a confirmation message to the user. expected result: product is added to the user's cart.

test case id: tc-getweather-001 title: user gets weather information module: getweather source pages: 1, 2, 5 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - location: new york test steps: 1. user clicks the "weather" button. 2. server receives the request for weather information. 3. server sends the request to the weather service. 4. weather service retrieves the weather data. 5. weather service sends the weather data to the server. 6. server sends the weather data to the user. expected result: user receives weather information for new york.

test case id: tc-login-002 title: user fails to log in due to invalid credentials module: login source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user has an invalid username or password. test data: - username: wronguser - password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. user enters "wronguser" into the username field. 2. user enters "wrongpassword" into the password field. 3. user clicks the login button. 4. server receives the login request. 5. server verifies the credentials. 6. server sends an error message to the user. expected result: user is not logged in and sees an error message.

test case id: tc-databasequery-002 title: server fails to query the database due to invalid query module: databasequery source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: server needs weather data. test data: - query: select * from invalid_table test steps: 1. server sends a query to the database. 2. database returns an error. expected result: server receives an error message from the database.

test case id: tc-placeorder-001 title: user places an order module: placeorder source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user has items in the cart. test data: - total amount: $100 test steps: 1. user clicks the "place order" button. 2. server calculates the total amount. 3. server sends the total amount to the checkout. 4. server processes the order. 5. server sends a confirmation message to the user. expected result: order is placed successfully and user is redirected to the order confirmation page.

test case id: tc-login-003 title: user logs out module: logout source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - no specific data required. test steps: 1. user clicks the logout button. 2. server receives the logout request. 3. server logs the user out. 4. server sends a confirmation message to the user. expected result: user is logged out and redirected to the login page.
